content.speakerText: Can I renew my books if I need more time?
content.speakerTextCn: 如果我需要更多时间，我可以续借吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, you can renew them once, as long as no one else has requested them.
Sure! Renewals are allowed — just come in before the due date.
You can extend the loan for another week, but only one time.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确回答是否可以续借，并说明条件
语言准确性：正确使用 'renew', 'extend', 'due date' 等关键词
表达自然度：使用了口语化表达（如 'Sure!', 'just come in'）
关键词覆盖：至少包含 'renew' 或 'extend' 和 'due date' 或 'requested'
